name: Artichoke and Crab Meat Salad (Aginara Kavoura)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tough outer leaves of the artichokes.
2. Cut off part of the stems and about one inch from the tips of each artichoke.
3. Cut the remaining artichokes in half lengthwise and scoop out the choke from each piece.
4. Place the prepared artichokes in a pot and cover with water.
5. Season the water with the juice of 1 lemon and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
6. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 30 minutes or until tender.
7. Drain the artichokes well and transfer them to a salad bowl.
8. Add crab meat and chopped olives to the bowl.
9. Whisk together 3/4 cup olive oil and juice from 2 to 3 lemons.
10. Add salt and pepper to taste.
11. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
Makes 4-6 servings.
